title: palicourea lutea
intro: Palicourea lutea, also known as the yellow palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea lutea include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Palicourea lutea include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health conditions.
